purpose_string: Isolate a second deterministic seed at the safer symmetric guide strength 0.65 after guide 0.75 caused a duplicate-horse identity hard failure.

predecessor_experiment_object.result_string: semantic gait QA rejected the candidate with 33 simultaneous swing frames, orderAccepted=false, and overlapAccepted=false; visual phase QA also hard-rejected it because the gray semantic reference horse remained mostly static while a second solid yellow-orange horse entered from the left and moved across it

positive_prompt_string: Static full-body side view. The exact supplied low-poly horse performs one slow natural four-beat walk cycle in place. First the yellow near-hind hoof lifts, arcs forward, and lands. Only after that landing, the cyan near-fore hoof lifts, arcs forward, and lands. Next the magenta far-hind hoof lifts, arcs forward, and lands. Finally the blue far-fore hoof lifts, arcs forward, and lands. These are four separate evenly spaced beats, one successive quarter of the clip each, never paired. During each swing the other hooves carry weight on the ground without skating. The pelvis shifts gently over the supporting legs while the spine, neck, and head counter-move subtly; bone lengths, hoof shapes, identity, colours, static camera, ground, background, and framing stay unchanged. As an optional timing cue, four soft isolated hoof-clop sounds occur exactly at the four landings; there is no music or voice. Frame 0 and frame 48 are the same moving mid-stance pass-through pose; motion and velocity continue smoothly through the seam without a hold.
negative_prompt_string: trot, pace, gallop, hopping, suspension, paired leg motion, diagonal pair, lateral pair, two hooves lifting or landing together, extra limb, missing limb, fused limb, morphing limb, rubber leg, changing bone length, hoof deformation, foot sliding, ground penetration, body translation, camera movement, crop, scene cut, colour swap, flicker, freeze, pause, reversal, snap, speech, voice, music, text, watermark, logo

audio_temporal_cue_object.cue_string: four soft isolated hoof-clop sounds, one at each landing

controlled_variable_string: second deterministic seed at the safer 0.65 guide matrix cell: compared with semantic v5, seed and recorded seed derivation change; prompt, negative prompt, optional audio cue, reference, workflow, frame contract, guide strength, camera, and QA gates remain byte-for-byte or value-for-value fixed
fixed_factors_array: same positive and negative prompts byte-for-byte as semantic v5 and v6
same optional audio temporal cue contract as semantic v5 and v6
same symmetric start/end guide strength 0.65 as semantic v5
same pinned local RTX 4090 worker and workflow fingerprint
same 49-frame start-plus-end loop contract and fixed camera
same four persistent colour identities and expected hoof order
one deterministic seed and one submission only
manual_acceptance_gates_array: all four colour identities persist through every frame
four separate single-hoof swing beats occur in yellow, cyan, magenta, blue order
no paired gait and at least two stance hooves support the body
no distal curl, hoof morph, segment-length drift, skating, or ground penetration
loop seam is continuous without a pause, reversal, or paired beat
audio is an optional timing cue and is not required for visual acceptance

generation_authorization_object.required_next_action_string: Runtime authorization must exactly match this immutable experiment id.
